title: エルムステークスにむけて

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ugh... ngh...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm trying to calm down. I get too excited if I
don't!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: But I just looove to run! I can't hold myself back!
choice_data_list:
You don't have to hold yourself back, you
know.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? But I have to take this seriously...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she doesn't know what it means,
she's worried about not being "serious" enough.
She needs to know that she's fine just as she is.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! I am?! How?
choice_data_list: Just go out there and find out!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Really? Okay, I will!

text_block_list.name: Everyone from the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Hey, Uraraaa!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, everyone! You all came to watch me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: W-wait, but this is Hokkaido!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: There's no place we wouldn't go for you!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Urara, we're sorry! We messed up before!

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
We were happy just watching you run, but we
didn't realize how our words held you back.

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
We didn't really believe in you. We didn't cheer
you on the way we should've.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: You guys...

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: But this time's different! Urara...

text_block_list.name: Happy Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Please! Please win!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: You gotta win! Our hopes are riding on you!

text_block_list.name: Kind Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: We wanna see you in the winner's circle!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: ...Okay! I will!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wow, I'm shaking! But it's a good shaking!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I... I won't lose to anyone! So please, watch me
race!
